title: Joseph Bongiorno

{{Top|rwp}}

'''Joseph "Joe" Bongiorno''' contributed to ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]'' from [[West End Games]] and co-wrote the article "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series]]" with [[Rich Handley]]. He is also the webmaster of the [http://www.starwarstimeline.net Star Wars Expanded Universe Timeline].

==Biography==
Joseph "Joe" Bongiorno provided playtesting and advice for ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]'', a [[roleplaying game]] accessory for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published in [[1996]].<ref name="Gamemaster Screen" /> He was thanked by author [[Peet Janes]] for his assistance with "[[The Horse's Mouth|The Passing of a Legend: Archie Goodwin]]," a tribute to [[Archie Goodwin]] that was published in [[Star Wars Insider 38|''Star Wars Insider'' 38]] after Goodwin's death in [[1998]].<ref name="Archie Goodwin">{{InsiderCite|38|The Horse's Mouth|The Passing of a Legend: Archie Goodwin}}</ref> Along with [[Rich Handley]], Bongiorno co-wrote the article "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series]]," which was published in the magazine [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer'' 1]] in [[2000]].<ref name="The Marvel Series" />

Following the publication of "The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series," Bongiorno began work on two articles, "[[Cult Encounters of the Star Wars Universe]]" and "[[Supernatural Encounters in the Star Wars Universe]]," the former of which was co-written with Handley and the latter of which would have followed the work on the former. The articles were intended for ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]''; however, that magazine was discontinued in [[2002]]. Bongiorno then reworked them into two proposals: an article that would have been titled "Cult Encounters: Excerpts from the Last Days of Arhul Hextrophon" and a novella that would have been titled ''[[Supernatural Encounters: The Trial and Transformation of Arhul Hextrophon]]''. He successfully pitched the duology for the [[StarWars.com]] subscriber section, [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]], and he had begun preparing them for publication when the closure of Hyperspace was announced in [[2010]]. The duology therefore was never officially published by [[Lucasfilm]], but he has continued to write and edit them.<ref name="SE">{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwarstimeline.net/Supernatural_Encounters.htm|text=Supernatural Encounters|author=Joe Bongiorno|work=[http://www.starwarstimeline.net Star Wars Expanded Universe Timeline]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/qUne1|archivedate=2021-11-07}}</ref>

Bongiorno is the creator and webmaster of the [http://www.starwarstimeline.net Star Wars Expanded Universe Timeline], a fan website that provides chronological information, reviews, and reading guides for works from the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, formerly known as the Expanded Universe. The website also archives unpublished ''[[Star Wars]]'' works, such as which are referred to as "lost (and found)."<ref name="Guide to the Timeline">{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwarstimeline.net/Holocron.htm|text=Guide to the Timeline|author=Joe Bongiorno|work=[http://www.starwarstimeline.net Star Wars Expanded Universe Timeline]|archivedate=20210225050504}}</ref> He has also self-published his own unpublished writing on the website.<ref name="SE" />
